title: Data Analyst (Internship) (H2 2026)
posting_summary: Internship supporting business decisions, metrics ownership, reporting, dashboards, stakeholder analytics, and SQL-based analysis for a consumer rewards platform.
annotator_notes: Strong MSIS analytics fit because the work centers on SQL, dashboards, business metrics, and stakeholder decision support.

title: Data Analyst (6-month internship)
posting_summary: Six-month internship answering product and business questions with Snowflake, Looker, dbt, BI onboarding, self-service analytics, and AI-assisted SQL initiatives.
annotator_notes: Excellent analytics test case with BI tooling, SQL, product analytics, and AI/data platform exposure.

title: Residential Data Analyst Intern
posting_summary: Intern role consolidating partner API, portal, and internal database data into dashboards and enrollment funnel analysis for virtual power plant programs.
annotator_notes: Strong fit for students targeting analytics roles because it combines SQL, Python, data joins, and operational dashboards.

title: Security Engineering & Operations Intern - Spring 2026
posting_summary: Security internship supporting vulnerability management, incident response workflows, SIEM detection tuning, cloud security analysis, AI security governance, and documentation.
annotator_notes: High-value cybersecurity gold example because the responsibilities include SIEM, incident response, vulnerability management, and security operations.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
posting_summary: Internship-style cybersecurity analyst program for students interested in security and technology, pairing interns with mentors on real security projects.
annotator_notes: Strong security role fit and student-friendly seniority; useful even though the public posting summary is less tool-specific.

title: GRC Analyst
posting_summary: Client-facing GRC analyst role supporting compliance assessments, risk findings, control gap analysis, audit readiness, vendor risk, and frameworks such as NIST, ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and CMMC.
annotator_notes: Strong content fit for tech risk and cyber GRC, but lower student relevance because it asks for several years of experience.

title: Information Security Compliance Intern
posting_summary: Intern role in an AI-native GRC platform with hands-on exposure to SOC 2, ISO 27001, audit partner lifecycle management, compliance automation, and security risk work.
annotator_notes: Good intern-level tech risk example combining compliance frameworks, information security, GRC, and AI-enabled compliance tooling.

title: 2026 Technical Product Manager Intern
posting_summary: Technical product management internship supporting autonomous driving product strategy, project intake and approval, roadmap alignment, validation strategy, PRD drafting, and resource allocation models.
annotator_notes: Strong product/project fit with AI systems context, roadmap work, PRDs, and cross-functional engineering prioritization.

title: Product Management Intern
posting_summary: Product management internship working with senior product managers and commercial, marketing, operations, and engineering stakeholders on product analysis, design, documentation, rollout, optimization, KPIs, and business cases.
annotator_notes: Clear PM internship fit for MSIS students interested in product analytics and cross-functional digital product execution.

title: AI Engineering Intern, Summer 2026
posting_summary: Engineering internship building LLM-enabled orchestration systems, MCP server connectivity, internal and customer-facing tools, and AI-driven software experiences.
annotator_notes: Strong software engineering fit with meaningful AI implementation signals and modern systems integration work.

title: Research Engineer Intern (Fall 2026)
posting_summary: Research engineering internship working with researchers on AI security, machine ethics, AI alignment, AI risk benchmarking, experiments, code review, publications, and large language model evaluation.
annotator_notes: Excellent AI research concentration example, but role taxonomy fit is only moderate because the target role list does not include research engineer.

title: Customer Success Strategy Intern - Spring 2026
posting_summary: Customer success internship centered on SaaS customer experience, community, events, coaching, and administrative support rather than technical analytics, security, product, or software delivery.
annotator_notes: Included as a negative/low-relevance control example for ranking and classifier evaluation.
